nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: White-tailed cotinga
nodes.summary: White-tailed cotinga（White-tailed cotinga，学名 Xipholena lamellipennis），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于亞馬遜盆地、亚马逊河，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 亚马逊河
nodes.summary: 亚马逊河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联34种鸟类，包括Red-throated piping guan、Marail guan、Spix's guan等34种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 亞馬遜盆地
nodes.summary: 亞馬遜盆地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联130种鸟类，包括灰穴䳍、小嘴穴䳍、绿翅雁等130种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The white-tailed cotinga is found in the lower Amazon Basin of Brazil south of the Amazon River

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The white-tailed cotinga is found in the lower Amazon Basin of Brazil south of the Amazon River

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "The primary threat to this species is accelerating deforestation in the Amazon basin as land is cleared for cattle ranching, soy production, selective logging and escaped fires, facilitated by expansion of the road network." It is poorly known and "[a]pparently nowhere common; as its congeners, however, it is a treetop bird easily overlooked in areas of unbroken forest"
